subcodes.first_line: O peoples of the world! The Ancient Beauty and the Most Great Name hath suffered no injury through the tyranny of princes and ministers, for verily that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اهل عالم ضر جمال قدم و اسم اعظم از ظلم امرا و وزرا نبوده و نیست چه که آنچه
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @fairmindedness; personal justice [insaf]
